title: Section 4
content: 4. No 1[petroleum lease] to be valid unless it is in accordance with this Act.--- (1) No 1[petroleum lease] shall be granted after the commencement of this act otherwise than in accordance with the rules made under this Act. (2) Any 1[petroleum lease] granted contrary to the provisions of sub-section (1) shall be void and of no effect.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 6 of 2025, s. 3, for "mining lease" (w.e.f. 15-4-2025)
